text.title: Neo4j Graph Database Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply nosql-neo4j-patterns end-to-end.

step.name: model-nodes-and-edges
step.action: Pick labels + relationship types; put context on edges, not nodes.

step.name: plan-indexes
step.action: CREATE INDEX on every filtered property; CREATE CONSTRAINT on globally unique properties.

step.name: validate-degree-distribution
step.action: Audit high-degree hub nodes; cap or specialise.
